---
title: "R Notebook"
output: NULL
date: 02-05-2024
---

### path normalization

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir=normalizePath('/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/data')) 
```


```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
#install.packages("patchwork")
# Read the Excel file
# Replace 'path_to_your_excel_file.xlsx' with the actual path to your Excel file
df <- read.csv("data/Revised_exp_data/PH_Revised.csv")
df$Pedigree <- gsub("PI ", "PI", df$Pedigree)
# Calculate the mean of the three replicates
head(df)
```

# take a quick and dirty look at the data distribution
```{r}
# calculated mean fresh weight
df[, 6:8] <- sapply(df[, 6:8], as.numeric)
mymean <- function(x) mean(x, na.rm=T);
df$mval <- apply(df[,6:8], 1, mymean)
#hist(df[df$Treatment == "HN", ]$mval)

# Plotting the histogram for HN treatment
ggplot(df, aes(x = mval, fill=Treatment)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.1) +
  labs(x = "Mean plant height", y = "Frequency", title = "Distribution of Mean plant height (HN)") +
  theme_minimal()

# change the font size
fsize =16
p1 <- ggplot(data=df, aes(x=mval, col= as.factor(Treatment)) ) +
    geom_histogram(bins=100) +
    #geom_density(adjust = 0.8, size=1.5) +
    #facet_wrap(~ trait, scales="free") +
    #scale_fill_manual(values = alpha(c("grey", "red"), .2)) +
    #guides(fill=FALSE) + factor(trait, levels=out$trait)
    labs(title="Distribution of seedling height", y=NULL, fill="Treatment") + 
    xlab("Average seedling height (cm)") + 
    ylab("Freequency") + 
    theme_bw() +
    theme(#axis.text.x=element_blank(), axis.ticks.x=element_blank(),
          axis.text=element_text(size=fsize),
          axis.title=element_text(size=fsize, face="bold"),
          legend.title = element_text(size=fsize, face="bold"),
          legend.text = element_text(size=fsize, face = "bold"),
          plot.title=element_text(size=fsize, face="bold")) + scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(min(df$mval, na.rm = TRUE), max(df$mval, na.rm = TRUE), by = 3))
p1    


# Set your specific directory path
directory_path <- "graphs/Raw_combined/"
# Specify the filename
filename <- "height.png"
# Combine directory path and filename
full_path <- file.path(directory_path, filename)

# Use ggsave() to save the plot
ggsave(full_path, plot = p1, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 500)
```



```{r}

#histogram with density plots

p1 <- ggplot(data=df, aes(x=mval, fill=as.factor(Treatment))) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..), bins=100, alpha=0.7) + 
  geom_density(aes(color= (Treatment)), size=1, alpha=0.5) + 
  labs(title="Distribution of Seedling Height", fill="Treatment") +
  xlab("Average Seedling Height (cm)") +
  ylab("Density") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=fsize),
        axis.title=element_text(size=fsize, face="bold"),
        legend.title=element_text(size=fsize, face="bold"),
        legend.text=element_text(size=fsize),
        plot.title=element_text(size=fsize, face="bold"))

p1
```


```{r}
data = read.table("PH")

data1 = read.table("DW.txt")
data2 = read.table("FW.txt")
data3 = read.table("LC.txt")
data4 = read.table("PH.txt")

data = na.omit(data)

data1 = na.omit(data1)
data2 = na.omit(data2)
data3 = na.omit(data3)
data4 = na.omit(data4)

mean_HN = mean(data$HN)
mean_LN = mean(data$LN)
t_test = t.test(data$HN, data$LN, paired = TRUE)

dw <- ggplot(data) +
  geom_density(aes(x = HN, fill = "HN"), alpha = 0.5) + 
  geom_density(aes(x = LN, fill = "LN"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean_HN), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean_LN), linetype = "dashed", color = "green") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("HN" = "red", "LN" = "green")) +
  theme_minimal()+
  labs(title = "plant height 2021 sap data", x = "cm", y = "Density") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16), axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14), axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12), axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12), legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10), legend.title = element_blank())


sig_label <- ifelse(t_test$p.value < 0.001, '***',
                   ifelse(t_test$p.value < 0.01, '**',
                   ifelse(t_test$p.value < 0.05, '*', 'ns')))

x_position <- mean(c(mean_HN, mean_LN))
y_position <- max(c(density(data$HN)$y, density(data$LN)$y))

# Add the significance label to the plot
dw <- dw + annotate("text", x = x_position, y = y_position, label = sig_label, size = 6, color ="blue")

# Display the plot
print(dw)
```


```{r}
# Combine the plots
final_plot <- H + l + f + p +
              plot_layout(ncol = 2)  # Arrange in 2 columns

# Print the combined plot
print(final_plot)

```

```{r}
create_density_plot <- function(data, main_title, x_label, y_label) {
  # Data preparation and analysis
  data <- na.omit(data)
  mean_HN <- mean(data$HN)
  mean_LN <- mean(data$LN)
  t_test <- t.test(data$HN, data$LN, paired = TRUE)
  
  # Determine significance label
  sig_label <- ifelse(t_test$p.value < 0.001, '***',
                      ifelse(t_test$p.value < 0.01, '**',
                             ifelse(t_test$p.value < 0.05, '*', 'ns')))
  
  # Calculate positions for annotation
  x_position <- mean(c(mean_HN, mean_LN))
  y_position <- max(c(density(data$HN)$y, density(data$LN)$y))
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(data) +
    geom_density(aes(x = HN, fill = "HN"), alpha = 0.5) + 
    geom_density(aes(x = LN, fill = "LN"), alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean_HN), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean_LN), linetype = "dashed", color = "green") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("HN" = "red", "LN" = "green")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = main_title, x = x_label, y = y_label) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
          axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
          axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))  # Corrected the syntax here
    # Add significance label
  p <- p + annotate("text", x = x_position, y = y_position, label = sig_label, size = 5, color = "black")

  return(p)
}

data1 = read.table("DW.txt")
data2 = read.table("FW.txt")
data3 = read.table("LC.txt")
data4 = read.table("PH.txt")

plot1 <- create_density_plot(data1, "Seedling Dry Weight", "gm", "Density", TRUE)
plot2 <- create_density_plot(data2, "Seedling Fresh Weight", "gm", "Density", FALSE)
plot3 <- create_density_plot(data3, "Leaf Count", "#number", "Density", FALSE)
plot4 <- create_density_plot(data4, "Plant Height", "cm", "Density", FALSE)


# Combine the plots
final_plot <- plot4 + plot3 + plot2 + plot1 +
              plot_layout(ncol = 2)  # Arrange in 2 columns

# Print the combined plot
print(final_plot)

```



```{r}
data1 = read.table("DW.txt")
data2 = read.table("FW.txt")
data3 = read.table("LC.txt")
data4 = read.table("PH.txt")

colnames(data1)
colnames(data1) <- c('Taxa', 'DW.HN', 'DW.LN')
colnames(data2) <- c('Taxa', 'FW.HN', 'FW.LN')
colnames(data3) <- c('Taxa', 'LC.HN', 'LC.LN')
colnames(data4) <- c('Taxa', 'PH.HN', 'PH.LN')


data1$DW.NR <- (data1$DW.HN - data1$DW.LN) / data1$DW.LN
data2$FW.NR <- (data2$FW.HN - data2$FW.LN) / data2$FW.LN
data3$LC.NR <- (data3$LC.HN - data3$LC.LN) / data3$LC.LN
data4$PH.NR <- (data4$PH.HN - data4$PH.LN) / data4$PH.LN


merge1 <- merge(data1, data2, by = "Taxa")
merge2 <- merge(merge1, data3, by = "Taxa")
merged_phenotype_data <- merge(merge2, data4, by = "Taxa")

colnames(merged_phenotype_data)[7] <- "SFW.NR"
write.table(merged_phenotype_data, "merged_phenotype_data.txt", sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)  # For combining multiple plots

# Function to create density plot
create_density_plot <- function(data, main_title, x_label, y_label) {
  # Data preparation and analysis
  data <- na.omit(data)
  mean_HN <- mean(data$HN)
  mean_LN <- mean(data$LN)
  t_test <- t.test(data$HN, data$LN, paired = TRUE)

  # Determine significance label
  sig_label <- ifelse(t_test$p.value < 0.001, '***',
                      ifelse(t_test$p.value < 0.01, '**',
                             ifelse(t_test$p.value < 0.05, '*', 'ns')))

  # Calculate positions for annotation
  x_position <- mean(c(mean_HN, mean_LN))
  y_position <- max(c(density(data$HN)$y, density(data$LN)$y))

  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(data) +
    geom_density(aes(x = HN, fill = "HN"), alpha = 0.5) + 
    geom_density(aes(x = LN, fill = "LN"), alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean_HN), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean_LN), linetype = "dashed", color = "green") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("HN" = "red", "LN" = "green")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = main_title, x = x_label, y = y_label) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 32),
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 28),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 28),  # Increased axis title size
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),   # Bold x-axis tick labels
      axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
    
    # Legend size adjustments
    legend.title = element_text(size = 24),  # Increase legend title size
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20),   # Increase legend text size
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "cm")        
    ) +
    annotate("text", x = x_position, y = y_position, label = sig_label, size = 5, color = "blue")

  return(p)
}

# Load your data
data1 <- read.table("DW.txt", header = TRUE)
data2 <- read.table("FW.txt", header = TRUE)
data3 <- read.table("LC.txt", header = TRUE)
data4 <- read.table("PH.txt", header = TRUE)

# Create individual plots
plot1 <- create_density_plot(data1, "Seedling Dry Weight", "gm", "Density")
plot2 <- create_density_plot(data2, "Seedling Fresh Weight", "gm", "Density")
plot3 <- create_density_plot(data3, "Leaf Count", "#number", "Density")
plot4 <- create_density_plot(data4, "Plant Height", "cm", "Density")

# Combine the plots using patchwork
final_plot <- (plot4 | plot3) / (plot2 | plot1) + 
              plot_layout(guides = "collect")

# Print the combined plot
print(final_plot)
#2021
data1 <- read.table("plant_height.txt", header = TRUE)
data2 <- read.table("DaysToFlower.txt", header = TRUE)
data3 <- read.table("StemDiameterLower.txt", header = TRUE)
data4 <- read.table("StemDiameterUpper.txt", header = TRUE)
data5 <- read.table("TillersPerPlant.txt", header = TRUE)

colnames(data1)[colnames(data1) == "PlantHeight_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(data1)[colnames(data1) == "PlantHeight_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(data1)[colnames(data1) == "PINumber"] <- "Taxa"
data1 = data1[,c (1:3)]

data1$HN = data1$HN*100
data1$LN = data1$LN*100
data1 <- data1[data1$Taxa != "PI 534063", ]

colnames(data2)[colnames(data2) == "DaysToFlower_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(data2)[colnames(data2) == "DaysToFlower_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(data2)[colnames(data2) == "PINumber"] <- "Taxa"
data2 = data2[,c (1:3)]

colnames(data3)[colnames(data3) == "StemDiameterLower_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(data3)[colnames(data3) == "StemDiameterLower_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(data3)[colnames(data3) == "PINumber"] <- "Taxa"
data3 = data3[,c (1:3)]
              
colnames(data4)[colnames(data4) == "StemDiameterUpper_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(data4)[colnames(data4) == "StemDiameterUpper_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(data4)[colnames(data4) == "PINumber"] <- "Taxa"
data4 = data4[,c (1:3)]              

colnames(data5)[colnames(data5) == "TillersPerPlant_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(data5)[colnames(data5) == "TillersPerPlant_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(data5)[colnames(data5) == "PINumber"] <- "Taxa"
data5 = data5[,c (1:3)] 

plot1 <- create_density_plot(data1, "Plant height", "cm", "Density") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
plot2 <- create_density_plot(data2, "Days to flower", "#Days", "Density")+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot3 <- create_density_plot(data3, "StemDiameterLower", "mm", "Density")+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot4 <- create_density_plot(data4, "StemDiameterUpper", "mm", "Density")+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot5 <- create_density_plot(data5, "TillersPerPlant", "#tillers", "Density")
                             
final_plot <- plot1 + plot2 + plot3 + plot4 + plot5 +
              plot_layout(ncol = 5)  # Arrange in 2 columns
#2020
d1 <- read.table("plantHeight.txt", header = TRUE)
d2 <- read.table("PanicleGrainWeight.txt", header = TRUE)
d3 <- read.table("BranchInternodeLength.txt", header = TRUE)
d4 <- read.table("DaysToBloom.txt", header = TRUE)
d5 <- read.table("TillersPerPlant.txt", header = TRUE)
d6 <- read.table("StemDiameterUpper.txt", header = TRUE)
d7 <- read.table("StemDiameterLower.txt", header = TRUE)
d8 <- read.table("RachisLength.txt", header = TRUE)
d9 <- read.table("PrimaryBranchNo.txt", header = TRUE)
d10 <- read.table("RachisDiameterLower.txt", header = TRUE)


colnames(d1)[colnames(d1) == "PlantHeight_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d1)[colnames(d1) == "PlantHeight_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d1)[colnames(d1) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d1 = d1[,c (1:3)]


colnames(d2)[colnames(d2) == "PanicleGrainWeight_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d2)[colnames(d2) == "PanicleGrainWeight_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d2)[colnames(d2) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d2 = d2[,c (1:3)]


colnames(d3)[colnames(d3) == "BranchInternodeLength_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d3)[colnames(d3) == "BranchInternodeLength_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d3)[colnames(d3) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d3 = d3[,c (1:3)]

colnames(d4)[colnames(d4) == "DaysToBloom_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d4)[colnames(d4) == "DaysToBloom_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d4)[colnames(d4) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d4 = d4[,c (1:3)]

colnames(d5)[colnames(d5) == "TillersPerPlant_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d5)[colnames(d5) == "TillersPerPlant_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d5)[colnames(d5) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d5 = d5[,c (1:3)]

colnames(d6)[colnames(d6) == "StemDiameterUpper_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d6)[colnames(d6) == "StemDiameterUpper_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d6)[colnames(d6) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d6 = d6[,c (1:3)]

colnames(d7)[colnames(d7) == "StemDiameterLower_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d7)[colnames(d7) == "StemDiameterLower_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d7)[colnames(d7) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d7 = d7[,c (1:3)]

colnames(d8)[colnames(d8) == "RachisLength_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d8)[colnames(d8) == "RachisLength_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d8)[colnames(d8) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d8 = d8[,c (1:3)]

colnames(d9)[colnames(d9) == "PrimaryBranchNo_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d9)[colnames(d9) == "PrimaryBranchNo_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d9)[colnames(d9) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d9 = d9[,c (1:3)]

colnames(d10)[colnames(d10) == "RachisDiameterLower_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d10)[colnames(d10) == "RachisDiameterLower_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d10)[colnames(d10) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d10 = d10[,c (1:3)]


d1 <- read.table("plantHeight.txt", header = TRUE)
d2 <- read.table("DaysToBloom.txt", header = TRUE)
d3 <- read.table("StemDiameterLower.txt", header = TRUE)
d4 <- read.table("StemDiameterUpper.txt", header = TRUE)
d5 <- read.table("TillersPerPlant.txt", header = TRUE)

colnames(d1)[colnames(d1) == "PlantHeight_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d1)[colnames(d1) == "PlantHeight_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d1)[colnames(d1) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d1 = d1[,c (1:3)]

colnames(d2)[colnames(d2) == "DaysToBloom_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d2)[colnames(d2) == "DaysToBloom_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d2)[colnames(d2) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d2 = d2[,c (1:3)]

colnames(d3)[colnames(d3) == "StemDiameterLower_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d3)[colnames(d3) == "StemDiameterLower_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d3)[colnames(d3) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d3 = d3[,c (1:3)]

colnames(d4)[colnames(d4) == "StemDiameterUpper_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d4)[colnames(d4) == "StemDiameterUpper_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d4)[colnames(d4) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d4 = d4[,c (1:3)]

colnames(d5)[colnames(d5) == "TillersPerPlant_LN"] <- "LN"
colnames(d5)[colnames(d5) == "TillersPerPlant_HN"] <- "HN"
colnames(d5)[colnames(d5) == "SorghumAccessionYellow"] <- "Taxa"
d5 = d5[,c (1:3)]


p1 <- create_density_plot(d1, "Plant height", "cm", "Density")+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
p2 <- create_density_plot(d2, "DaysToBloom", "#Days", "Density")+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
p3 <- create_density_plot(d3, "StemDiameterLower", "mm", "Density")+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
p4 <- create_density_plot(d4, "StemDiameterUpper", "mm", "Density")+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
p5 <- create_density_plot(d5, "TillersPerPlant", "#tillers", "Density")+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

final_plo1 <- p1 + p2 + p3 + p4 + p5 +
              plot_layout(ncol = 5)  # Arrange in 2 columns

# Merge phenotype data with cluster data
# Read the sorted cluster data without the header (skip the first row)
sap <- read.table("sorted_cluster_data.txt", header = FALSE, skip = 1, col.names = c("Cluster", "PI_numbers"))

# Check the first few rows to confirm
head(sap)

colnames(sap)[colnames(sap) == "PI_numbers"] <- "Taxa"

sap$Taxa <- gsub("PI", "PI ", sap$Taxa)

merged_data <- merge(d2, sap, by = "Taxa")
# Load the necessary library
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# Convert the data to long format for HN and LN conditions
long_data <- merged_data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("HN", "LN"), names_to = "Condition", values_to = "DaysToBloom")

# Create the density plot
k = ggplot(long_data, aes(x = DaysToBloom, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ Cluster, scales = "free") +  # Separate plots for each cluster
  labs(x = "Days to Bloom", y = "Density", title = "Density Plot of Days to Bloom by Cluster") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")


```
